name: Warn on Direct Fetch Usage
description: When a frontend file is saved, check if it uses fetch() directly instead of the api axios instance and remind the agent to fix it

then.prompt: A frontend file was just saved. Quickly scan it for any direct use of `fetch(` — if found, replace it with the `api` axios instance from `@/lib/api`. The api instance automatically attaches the JWT Authorization header. Direct fetch() calls will fail on authenticated endpoints.
